---
title: "Schedule"
---

![](../img/nfa_iowa_hill_pano_reduced.jpg)

## Class Day 1

09:00am--12:30pm (Apr 30, 2026)

  - 9:00--9:05 Intro/Overview
  - 9:05--9:50 Natural History
  - 9:50--10:00 BREAK
  - 10:00--10:50 Ecology & Tadpoles
  - 10:50--11:00 BREAK
  - 11:00--11:35 Unnatural History
  - 11:35--12:25 Habitat
  - 12:25--12:30 Wrap Up

## Class Day 2

09:00am--12:30pm (May 1, 2026)

  - 9:00--9:05 Welcome Back
  - 9:05--9:30 Habitat (cont)
  - 9:30--9:45 Status & Policy
  - 9:45--10:00 Management
  - 10:00--10:10 BREAK
  - 10:10--11:00 Survey Methods
  - 11:00--11:20 Decon
  - 11:20--11:30 BREAK
  - 11:30--12:15 Conservation/Phenology
  - 12:15--12:30 Q&A/Wrap Up 

    
## Field Day I & II at [Sunol Wilderness Regional Preserve](https://www.ebparks.org/parks/sunol)

I:  9:00am – 12:15pm (May 4, 2025)
II: 1:00pm – 4:15pm (May 4, 2025)

  -   Survey Methods
  -   Habitat Assessment
  -   Decon
  -   Practice
